title: Access the Tipping Station HMI Screen
summary: Navigate through the system HMI by pressing SMALLS, selecting ACB, selecting ACB1 - AMT TT, and pressing the tipper button to open the Tipping Station screen for viewing bag completion counts, errors, and task timing information.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to open the Tipping Station HMI screen for the ACB1 - AMT TT tipper view to review completed bags, errors, and task duration information.

responsibilities: Perform the documented HMI navigation path.
Verify that the Tipping Station screen is displayed.

safety_notes: Use only the documented HMI navigation path from the manual.
Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Ability to press SMALLS and use the drop-down menu
Tipping Station screen navigation path from the manual

system_preconditions: The HMI is available for operator use.
The SMALLS navigation path and ACB selection options are present on the HMI.

external_references.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

visual_references.description: Smalls System Overview screen showing the SMALLS entry point used to begin navigation.
ACB System overview-related screen artifact associated with the SMALLS > ACB > ACB1 - AMT TT navigation context.
Tipping Station screen artifact showing the destination screen used to view bag completion counts, errors, and task timing information.

steps.title: Press SMALLS
steps.purpose: Open the SMALLS navigation path used to reach the ACB1 - AMT TT tipper view.
steps.instruction: On the system HMI, press SMALLS.
steps.expected_result: The SMALLS navigation view opens and allows further selection of ACB options.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI displays the SMALLS overview or navigation context.
steps.failure_condition: The SMALLS button is not present or pressing it does not open the expected navigation view.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The SMALLS overview screen and the SMALLS entry point used to begin navigation.
Reference destination screen for the Tipping Station view that this navigation path is intended to reach.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

steps.title: Select ACB from the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Choose the ACB system context required for the documented navigation path.
steps.expected_result: The HMI is set to the ACB selection context.
steps.healthy_condition: The ACB option is available and becomes the active selection.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB option is not present in the drop-down menu or cannot be selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The ACB system overview-related selection context associated with SMALLS > ACB > ACB1 - AMT TT.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

steps.title: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
steps.purpose: Choose the specific ACB1 - AMT TT option required before opening the tipper view.
steps.instruction: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the available options.
steps.expected_result: The HMI is set to the ACB1 - AMT TT context.
steps.healthy_condition: The ACB1 - AMT TT option is available and becomes the active selection.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB1 - AMT TT option is not present or cannot be selected.

actions.label: Select ACB1 - AMT TT
actions.exact_action: Select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The ACB1 - AMT TT selection context referenced by the manual for reaching the tipper view.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

steps.title: Press the tipper button
steps.purpose: Open the Tipping Station screen from the selected ACB1 - AMT TT context.
steps.instruction: Press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.
steps.expected_result: The HMI opens the Tipping Station screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The tipper button is visible on the right side of the screen and opens the destination screen when pressed.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper button is not present on the right side of the screen or pressing it does not open the Tipping Station screen.

actions.label: Open tipper view
actions.exact_action: Press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The ACB/ACB1 - AMT TT navigation context before opening the tipper view.
The destination Tipping Station screen that should open after pressing the tipper button.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

steps.title: Verify the Tipping Station screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the navigation path succeeded and the correct HMI screen is open.
steps.instruction: Verify that the "Tipping Station" screen is displayed.
steps.expected_result: The Tipping Station screen is visible and available for viewing.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed screen matches the Tipping Station screen and shows information about completed bags, errors, and how long tasks take.
steps.failure_condition: The Tipping Station screen does not appear, or the displayed screen does not match the expected destination.

actions.label: Confirm destination screen
actions.exact_action: Verify that the "Tipping Station" screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Tipping Station screen layout and the information shown for completed bags, errors, and task duration.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Tipping Station" screen provides information on how many bags are completed, errors, and how long tasks take.
To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

success_criteria: The Tipping Station screen opens successfully.
The operator can view information about completed bags, errors, and task duration.
healthy_conditions: SMALLS, ACB, and ACB1 - AMT TT are available in the documented navigation path.
The tipper button is present on the right side of the screen.
The displayed screen matches the Tipping Station screen shown in Figure 4-7.
failure_conditions: The documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
The operator cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.
The displayed screen does not match the expected Tipping Station screen.
escalation_guidance: Stop if the documented menu options or button are not present as described in the source.
Escalate if the user cannot reach the Tipping Station screen using the documented navigation path.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: SMALLS overview entry point used to begin the navigation path.
ACB and ACB1 - AMT TT selection context associated with the documented navigation path.
Destination Tipping Station screen used to confirm successful navigation.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: To access this information, press SMALLS then select "ACB" from the drop-down menu. Then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" from the options. Then press the tipper button on the right side of the screen.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source packet does not state whether production must be stopped.
The source packet does not state whether lockout/tagout is required.
The source packet does not provide explicit role boundaries beyond operator use.
The source packet does not provide a dedicated artifact that explicitly shows the tipper button on the right side within the ACB1 - AMT TT selection context.
